title: Exotic Earthy Peruvian Tofu Skillet
description: A garlicky and snappy Peruvian dish featuring hojicha and smoked hot flavors, perfect for a hangover cure, made in a cast iron skillet with plant based friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 3 minutes until translucent.
Add the sliced peruvian aji amarillo peppers and cook for 2 minutes until tender.
Add the cubed tofu and cook for 5 minutes until golden brown.
Add the hojicha tea powder, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium low and simmer for 10 minutes until the flavors have melded together.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice for a filling meal.
